subject: Re: Fw: Good morning

body_html:
have wlater talk to debbie jelnik directly

--- dkiesq@aol.com wrote:

Please advise
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: "Novembre, Walter"
WNovembre@Limitedbrands.com
Date: Sat, 16 Sep 2006 05:13:09
To:dkiesq@aol.com
Cc:pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Good morning

Subject. Ranch lake develp II. Furniture

And just a brief query - am I correct in. Saying
that Mr E said it was ok
for the former owner to have the 5 pieces of
furniture. That they had asked
for ?
Please advise. If he didn't then we will jsut leave
it alone.
In our last conversation you had said that the
direction was that we could
do whatever Mre W had wanted us to.
Well - please elaborate on the options so I better
understand. We want to
make sure that we do everything correctly

  1. Since we now purchased itesm for Gil s place we
    have no real use for the
    furniture
  2. If we sold it - whose name does it need to go
    under?
    3 if it was donated to the charity (our coalition
    against domestiv violence)
    thencoulkd we sell it for paymeny?
    Meaning the owner gave it to the chairty event - the
    new albany classic
    which solely supports the charity and then iit is
    sold for a check to the
    event ?
    Yes or no. Or other. Please advise
    And pardon my spelling on this little contraption
    All the best. WN
